name: ExtensionTestPlan_Dependency
title: R5: The required criteria to execute the test plan - e.g. preconditions, previous tests (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `TestPlan.dependency` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`TestPlan.dependency` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `TestPlan.dependency` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `TestPlan.dependency` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `TestPlan` is not mapped.
Element `TestPlan.dependency` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
